name: pure-style-extraction
description: Extract pure style-generation functions from Svelte components into plain .ts modules for testability. MapCanvas paint/layout/filter functions depend only on Layer data — no reactivity needed. Reactive wrappers in the component delegate to pure functions, adding only editor state. Pattern: getLayerPaintBase (pure) + applyHighlight (pure) composed in local getLayerPaint (reactive). getLayerFilter takes fslConverter as injected dependency so tests can stub it.

title: Keep activity feed infrastructure intact
rationale: Seed felt-like-it-a0a7 claimed eventsRouter had zero UI consumers, but investigation found: ActivityFeed.svelte (230-line component) calls trpc.events.list, MapEditor.svelte renders it and writes via trpc.events.log.mutate. Tests exist. Not dead code.
